name: Ultramar Diamond Shamrock
description: Ultramar Diamond Shamrock Corporation (UDS) was a prominent American independent oil refining and marketing company based in San Antonio, Texas. Formed in 1996 through the merger of Ultramar Corporation and Diamond Shamrock, the company operated an extensive network of refineries, pipelines, and retail gasoline stations across the United States and Canada. It was recognized as one of the largest independent refiners in the U.S. before being acquired by Valero Energy Corporation in 2001. Today, the Diamond Shamrock brand continues to exist as a retail gasoline station chain under Valero's ownership.
